member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CaptureOrderPaymentRequest.CaptureDetails
member.summary: Provides information about the charge that customers see on their statements. If Seller provides this information, a payment provider can implement it.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CaptureOrderPaymentRequest.CloseTransaction
member.summary: Set to True to close a transaction, restricting future capture operations against this order; otherwise, set to False. By default, False.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShoppingCartId
member.summary: The base shopping cart ID the order was created with

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.IsPrototype
member.summary: This checkbox determines whether the order is a prototype

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PurchaseOrderNumber
member.summary: The order internal number provided by customer

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubscriptionNumber
member.summary: Number of subscription associated with this order

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubscriptionId
member.summary: The ID of subscription associated with this order

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.DiscountAmount
member.summary: When a discount is applied to the order, the tax calculation has already been applied and is shown in the tax field. Therefore, the discount will not be taking tax into account. For instance, if the cart subtotal is $100, and the tax subtotal is $15, a 10% discount will yield a total of $105 ($100 subtotal – $10 discount + $15 tax).

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.Total
member.summary: Order grand total

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubTotal
member.summary: Amount of the item prices

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the item prices with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubTotalDiscount
member.summary: Amount of the item discount total

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubTotalDiscountWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the item discount total with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.SubTotalTaxTotal
member.summary: Amount of the item tax total

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingTotal
member.summary: Amount of the shipment total

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the shipment total with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingSubTotal
member.summary: Amount of the shipment prices

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingSubTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the shipment prices with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingDiscountTotal
member.summary: Amount of the shipment discount amounts

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingDiscountTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the shipment discount amounts with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.ShippingTaxTotal
member.summary: Reserved for future needs

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentTotal
member.summary: Amount of the payments totals

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the payment totals with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentSubTotal
member.summary: Amount of the payment prices

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentSubTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the payment prices with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentDiscountTotal
member.summary: Amount of the payments discount amounts

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentDiscountTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the payment discount amounts with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.PaymentTaxTotal
member.summary: Reserved for future needs

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.DiscountTotal
member.summary: Amount of the discount amounts of items, shipments and payments, and the order discount amount

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.DiscountTotalWithTax
member.summary: Amount of the discount amounts with tax of items, shipments and payments, and the order discount amount with tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.Fee
member.summary: Any extra fees applied to the order. This value comes from the cart

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.FeeWithTax
member.summary: Order fee with applied tax factor

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.FeeTotal
member.summary: Amount of the order fee, as well as any item, shipment, and payment fees

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.FeeTotalWithTax
member.summary: Total fee with applied tax factor

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.HandlingTotal
member.summary: Reserved for future needs

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.HandlingTotalWithTax
member.summary: Reserved for future needs

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.TaxType
member.summary: Tax category or type

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder.TaxTotal
member.summary: Amount of tax totals for items, shipments, and payments without the order discount amount with tax factor applied

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.PriceId
member.summary: Price id

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.Price
member.summary: unit price without discount and tax

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.PlacedPrice
member.summary: Resulting price with discount for one unit

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.DiscountAmount
member.summary: Gets the value of the single qty line item discount amount

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.IsDiscountAmountRounded
P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.TaxType
member.summary: Tax category or type

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.LineItem.ReserveQuantity
member.summary: Reserve quantity

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.OrderOperation.CancelledState
member.summary: For system use to handle canellation flow

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.OrderOperation.IsCancelled
member.summary: Used by payment provides to indicate that cancellation operation has completed

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.OrderPaymentResult.ErrorCode
member.summary: ECommerce Flow Relaied Type: INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR: Invalid request errors arise when your request has invalid parameters or the payment provider doesn’t support the operation PAYMENT_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: The payment provider is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact customer support if the issue persists. Payment Provider Errors: PAYMENT_FAILED: Payment capture failed. Please try again later or contact customer support if the issue persists.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentDistributedLockOptions.LockTimeout
member.summary: The maximum duration the resource will be locked. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentDistributedLockOptions.TryLockTimeout
member.summary: The duration to attempt acquiring the locked resource. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentDistributedLockOptions.RetryInterval
member.summary: The interval between lock acquisition retries. Default: 1 second.

member.name: F:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentFlowErrorCodes.InvalidRequestError
member.summary: Invalid request errors arise when your request has invalid parameters or the payment provider doesn’t support the operation

member.name: F:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentFlowErrorCodes.PaymentProviderUnavailable
member.summary: The payment provider is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact customer support if the issue persists.

member.name: F:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentFlowErrorCodes.PaymentFailed
member.summary: Payment failed. Please try again later or contact customer support if the issue persists.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.IsProcessed
member.summary: Flag represent that current transaction is processed

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.ProcessedDate
member.summary: Date when this transaction was handled

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.RequestData
member.summary: Raw request data

member.summary: Raw response data

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.ResponseCode
member.summary: Gateway or VC response status code

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.GatewayIpAddress
member.summary: Gateway IP address

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.Type
member.summary: The type of payment interaction.The payment can be Capture or CheckReceived. The value also includes customer payment interactions such as Website, Call, Store, or Unknown.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentGatewayTransaction.Status
member.summary: "Active", "Expired", and "Inactive" or other

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentIn.GatewayCode
member.summary: Payment method (gateway) code

member.summary: Payment method contains additional payment method information

member.summary: Tax category or type

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Services.ICustomerOrderStatisticService.CollectStatisticsAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates various order statistics for a dashboard based on the provided start and end dates.
member.returns: Returns a DashboardStatisticsResult object that encapsulates the computed statistics.
